name: Extra-Rich Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips, evaporated milk, and butter in a small saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and creamy.
3. In a bowl, combine the eggs, sugar, flour, salt, vanilla, and pecans; mix well.
4. Gradually stir the chocolate mixture into the egg mixture, blending well.
5. Pour the batter into the unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake in a 375 degree F oven for 40 minutes or until the filling is set.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
